About Me

I’m a passionate Data Analyst who enjoys transforming raw data into meaningful insights that help drive smarter decisions. I have a strong interest in exploring data, discovering patterns, and turning complex information into clear and impactful visualizations. I work with tools such as Python, Excel, SQL, Power BI, and Tableau to clean, analyze, and visualize data. I enjoy building dashboards and analytical projects that help present data in a simple and understandable way. Through continuous learning and hands-on projects, I focus on improving my analytical thinking, problem-solving skills, and technical abilities in the field of data analysis. My goal is to grow as a professional Data Analyst and contribute to organizations by helping them make informed, data-driven decisions.

I work with tools like Python, Power BI, Tableau, SQL, and Excel — and I enjoy tackling real-world datasets through freelance projects and hands-on training.

Currently building my skills and portfolio while actively seeking opportunities to contribute and grow.

Analytical Mindset Problem Solver Freelancer AI Engineering
